positive: A highly detailed, stylized cosmic forest scene. Central composition featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna (glowing glowing mushrooms, crystalline trees, and ethereal creatures) against a deep indigo and midnight blue nebula backdrop. The style is elegant neo-geometric fantasy mixed with Art Deco fluidity. Emphasis on clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast—elements should glow intensely while maintaining sharp edges. Composition must be centered and scalable for apparel printing. Dramatic rim lighting, deep depth of field, vaporwave cosmic aesthetic. Flat graphic design quality meets photorealistic luminescence.
negative: blurry, grain, low quality, noise, text, watermark, signature, dirty, messy, extra limbs, malformed anatomy, abstract, cropped, out of focus
